payload.answer: I’m not sure which Sam you mean. Can you clarify?

entity_resolution.reason: The note refers to “Sam,” but the intended person/entity is ambiguous. Model confidence is low and cloud escalation is disabled, so no durable memory should be committed without user clarification.

details: No memory was saved because the referenced entity “Sam” is ambiguous.
Cloud escalation is disabled, so the system should request clarification from the user instead.

repair_options: Ask the user which Sam the note refers to.
Do not commit the note as durable memory until the entity is resolved.
